result.stdout:
Description:
  GoCli - SuperSDK Application Scaffolding Tool

Usage:
  GoCli [command] [options]

Options:
  -new <new>      Create a new SuperSDK Avalonia MVVM app (Logger & SQL Debug enabled by default)
  -pylib <pylib>  Create a Python bridge library project inheriting GzPythonWrapper
  -add            Add SuperSDK packages to current project
  -update         Upgrade SuperSDK packages in current project
  -v <v>          Target version, used with -add / -update []
  -info           Show environment information
  -vali           Validate current directory as a valid SuperSDK project
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  run              Build and run the current project
  git              Git shortcuts
  pack <name>      Package project for distribution on each platform []
  upgrade          Check NuGet for the latest version and auto-update GoCli
  local <version>  Local .NET Tool development utilities []

commands.payload:
Description:
  GoCli - SuperSDK Application Scaffolding Tool

Usage:
  GoCli [command] [options]

Options:
  -new <new>      Create a new SuperSDK Avalonia MVVM app (Logger & SQL Debug enabled by default)
  -pylib <pylib>  Create a Python bridge library project inheriting GzPythonWrapper
  -add            Add SuperSDK packages to current project
  -update         Upgrade SuperSDK packages in current project
  -v <v>          Target version, used with -add / -update []
  -info           Show environment information
  -vali           Validate current directory as a valid SuperSDK project
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  run              Build and run the current project
  git              Git shortcuts
  pack <name>      Package project for distribution on each platform []
  upgrade          Check NuGet for the latest version and auto-update GoCli
  local <version>  Local .NET Tool development utilities []

result.stdout:
Description:
  Git shortcuts

Usage:
  GoCli git [options]

Options:
  -c <c>          Commit message - stage all files and commit []
  -p              Push current branch and auto-push local tags
  -t <t>          Create a local tag (e.g. v3.10.2) []
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Git shortcuts

Usage:
  GoCli git [options]

Options:
  -c <c>          Commit message - stage all files and commit []
  -p              Push current branch and auto-push local tags
  -t <t>          Create a local tag (e.g. v3.10.2) []
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Local .NET Tool development utilities

Usage:
  GoCli local [<version>] [options]

Arguments:
  <version>  Install version (uses project default if omitted) []

Options:
  -inst           Rebuild and locally install the current .NET Tool project
  -sysinit        Add .NET tools path to system PATH
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Local .NET Tool development utilities

Usage:
  GoCli local [<version>] [options]

Arguments:
  <version>  Install version (uses project default if omitted) []

Options:
  -inst           Rebuild and locally install the current .NET Tool project
  -sysinit        Add .NET tools path to system PATH
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Package project for distribution on each platform

Usage:
  GoCli pack [<name>] [options]

Arguments:
  <name>  Custom output name (replaces project name as exe/App Bundle name) []

Options:
  -mac            macOS: osx-arm64 + osx-x64 → .dmg
  -win            Windows: win-x64 + win-x86 → .zip
  -lin            Linux: linux-x64 → .tar.gz
  -o <o>          Output directory (default: ./publish) []
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Package project for distribution on each platform

Usage:
  GoCli pack [<name>] [options]

Arguments:
  <name>  Custom output name (replaces project name as exe/App Bundle name) []

Options:
  -mac            macOS: osx-arm64 + osx-x64 → .dmg
  -win            Windows: win-x64 + win-x86 → .zip
  -lin            Linux: linux-x64 → .tar.gz
  -o <o>          Output directory (default: ./publish) []
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Build and run the current project

Usage:
  GoCli run [options]

Options:
  -r              Release configuration (default: Debug)
  -f              Force clean + rebuild before running
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
